rejection_reason: Profit protection either truncated winners or failed to improve most windows materially.
next_retry_requires: Do not retry nearby 0-2% protection stops after +3% MFE without new evidence.
A valid retry needs an orthogonal adverse context such as failed reclaim or fresh negative event.
